content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
428 J Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento, CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

March 28, 2003

Melvin Shapiro
3930 Centre Street, #103
San Diego, CA 92103

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-03-055

Dear Mr. Shapiro:

This letter is in response to your request for written advice on the gift provisions of the Political Reform Act.¹ Under California Code of Regulations 18329(b)(8)(B), copy enclosed, unless you are an authorized representative of Casey Gwinn, for whom you seek assistance, the Fair Political Practices Commission cannot address your questions or provide analysis. However, if you believe a violation of the Political Reform Act has occurred, you have the option of filing a complaint with our Enforcement Division. I have enclosed a fact sheet explaining the complaint process procedure.

Should you have additional questions regarding this matter, please do not hesitate to contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

John W. Wallace
Assistant General Counsel

Enclosures
JWW:jg

¹ Government Code sections 81000-91014. Commission regulations appear at Title 2, sections 18109-18997, of the California Code of Regulations.
